chunks.text: Introducing Elon Musk, and reflecting on his DOGE experience
Optimus: Progress and potential, the "hands problem"
Tesla: AI5 chips, impact on FSD
SpaceX: Vision for Starlink-enabled smartphones, $17B spectrum deal, Starship update

Understanding the universe, going to the Moon, what happens on Mars?
